creator: Udo.Schweigert@mchp.siemens.de
text:
I have a PCMCIA Modem called "Xircom CreditCard Modem 56 - GlobalACCESS"
for which i wrote the following entry to /etc/pccard.conf to get it working
under FreeBSD 3.1-STABLE:

Fix: 

/etc/pccard.conf

card "Xircom" "CreditCard Modem 56 - GlobalA"
 	config 0x1f "sio2" 11
 	insert  echo Xircom CreditCard Modem 56 - GlobalACCESS inserted
 	remove  echo Xircom CreditCard Modem 56 - GlobalACCESS removed
